principle: Write each paragraph as a standalone fragment AI can embed without modification — AI models scan pages for extractable semantic blocks and skip paragraphs that mix multiple ideas or open with vague hedges
explanation: X.seo|ai_fragment: AI_scans=semantic_blocks -> finds_embeddable_fragments -> assembles_answer; fragment_rules: one_thought_per_paragraph+self-contained_without_context+3-5_sentences(8-10=perceived_as_mass_not_unit); types: definitional(X_is_Y)+mechanistic(X_works:A->B->C)+cause-effect(X_because_Y->Z); structural_labels: start_with_Definition:+Cause:+Mechanism:+Function: -> AI_recognizes_as_structural; NO:paragraph_mixing_definition+example+conclusion NO:opening_with_hedges(Today/It_should_be_noted/It_is_believed); eg: 8-sentence_essay_paragraph >> 3-sentence_cause-effect_fragment -> AI_cites_exact_paragraph

principle: Match paragraph structure to the query's intent type — AI selects the fragment that fits the answer shape it needs, not the best-written text; a definition query needs a definitional paragraph, an instruction query needs numbered steps
explanation: X.seo|intent_fragment_match: AI_answer_shape_determined_by_intent -> AI_searches_fragment_matching_that_shape; intent_types: definition(short_exact_paragraph)+mechanism(linear_A->B->C)+cause-effect(X_because_Y->Z)+comparison(criteria_table)+choice(decision_criteria)+instruction(numbered_steps); mismatch=skipped: definition_query+page_has_only_narrative -> AI_skips; first_2-3_paragraphs_signal_dominant_intent -> model_calibrates_from_there; NO:page_mixing_all_intents_without_dominant NO:how-to_opening_with_marketing_intro; eg: mechanism_query + narrative_page >> rewrite_lead: Process_works_as: -> AI_picks_fragment

principle: Target the 7 AI answer patterns that models reuse across Google, Yandex, and Bing — fragments structurally matching these patterns get embedded without rewriting; anything requiring editorial interpretation gets skipped
explanation: X.seo|ai_answer_patterns: 7_patterns: definition+function + how_it_works(linear_sequence) + problem+steps + comparison(criteria_table) + factor_analytics(factor->impact->consequence) + recommendation(criteria+best_fit) + Q&A(question+short_answer); rule: identify_dominant_intent -> write_in_matching_pattern -> strip_intros+emotions+rhetoric; pattern_match=model_embeds_fragment_without_rewriting; NO:narrative_storytelling_for_instructional_queries NO:preamble_before_the_structural_answer; eg: factor_analytics: Rate_growth_slows_mortgages._Result:_fewer_new_loans -> AI_embeds_directly

principle: Build evidence pages around key landing pages — AI evaluates a site as a system, and surrounding core pages with supporting analytics, FAQs, and case studies signals consistent expertise that raises citation probability across the entire domain
explanation: X.seo|evidence_pages: AI_evaluates_project_as_system(not_individual_pages); evidence_pages=supporting_content_around_core_page: analytics+FAQ+case_studies+process_explanations; effect: model_perceives_domain_as_consistent_expert -> higher_trust_in_all_fragments; structure: /services/seo + /seo-audit-methodology+/seo-faq+/seo-cases -> coherent_system; NO:single_landing_page_with_no_supporting_content NO:evidence_pages_on_different_topic_from_core; eg: plumber_landing_only >> add: how_pipe_repair_works+FAQ+emergency_case -> AI_cites_domain_more_broadly

principle: Diagnose AI invisibility by watching for stable rankings with falling traffic — this pattern means AI overviews are answering the query and consuming clicks without citing your page, not that your rankings dropped
explanation: X.seo|ai_invisibility: signal: stable_SERP_position + falling_organic_traffic = AI_overview_serves_query_without_you; fix: check_AI_overview_for_your_keywords -> rewrite_page_fragments_to_match_AI_answer_patterns; authority_AI_uses: stable_thematic_focus+deep_topic_coverage+external_mentions+structural_fragments; domain_age+DA NOT_decisive -> consistent_topic_structure_is; NO:treating_AI_traffic_loss_as_ranking_penalty NO:deleting_content_when_positions_are_stable; eg: rank_#3_unchanged + traffic_-40% -> AI_overview_present -> rewrite_lead_paragraphs -> AI_starts_citing_your_fragments
